channel.title: The Magnificat
channel.description: The Magnificat Audio Series is a year‑round devotional companion rooted in Mary’s prayer: “My soul proclaims the greatness of the Lord.” Each episode offers a simple, contemplative moment of praise—whether for the month, for the days of Advent, or for the Christmas Octave. This evergreen collection includes: • Monthly Magnificat reflections for January through November • Daily Magnificat prayers for December 1–24 • The full Christmas Octave from December 25 to January 1 You can follow along each day at https://themagnificat.dailyaudio.cf/, where the correct month and date are displayed automatically. The website updates like a live devotional guide, helping you pray the Magnificat in harmony with the liturgical season. Designed for quiet reflection, personal prayer, and daily renewal, the Magnificat Audio Series invites you to pause, breathe, and join Mary in praising God’s faithfulness. Suitable for all seasons and all years, this series remains timeless, prayerful, and always available whenever you need a moment of grace.
channel.author: Eric Kouassi
channel.summary: A daily audio prayer of the Magnificat, inviting you into stillness, praise, and renewal throughout the year.

funding.text: Support the Show by Buying Me a Coffee

episodes.title: Magnificat Prayer For 01 January
episodes.description: A simple, contemplative audio prayer of the Magnificat, offered daily as a moment of praise, stillness, and renewal. Rooted in Mary’s song — “My soul proclaims the greatness of the Lord” — this series guides you through monthly reflections, Advent days, and the Christmas Octave with quiet devotion and timeless simplicity.
episodes.author: Eric Kouassi
episodes.subtitle: Monthly Magnificat Prayer
episodes.summary: A daily audio prayer of the Magnificat, inviting you into stillness, praise, and renewal throughout the year.
